title: schedonorus sylvaticus
intro: Schedonorus sylvaticus, also known as timothy grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of timothy grass include supporting immune function, reducing stress, and promoting overall well-being. Timothy grass is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
